entries.title: Events index.
entries.notes: Capture with at least three seeded events across public/private or scheduled states so event table columns and controls are meaningful.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews upcoming event records before opening one for schedule or registration changes.

entries.title: Create event form.
entries.notes: Capture after event publishing defaults are registered so blueprint and layout defaults are available on create.
entries.useCase: An editor creates an event with schedule, recurrence, visibility, publishing, and registration settings.

entries.title: Edit event form.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded event with recurrence and at least one generated occurrence so event state is not blank.
entries.useCase: An editor adjusts an existing recurring event and checks registration or publication state before saving.

entries.title: Event venues management.
entries.notes: Capture with at least one venue that has address fields and a map URL so the management table is populated.
entries.useCase: An administrator manages reusable venues for events and confirms address details are visible.

entries.title: Event occurrences management.
entries.notes: Requires generated occurrences from SyncEventOccurrencesAction, including one override or cancelled occurrence when possible.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews materialized event dates, statuses, venues, and registration counts.

entries.title: Event registrations management.
entries.notes: Requires native RSVP demo data with at least one pending, confirmed, or waitlisted registration.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews event attendee registrations, quantities, statuses, and related occurrences.

entries.title: Admin event calendar page.
entries.notes: Requires View:EventCalendarPage permission and seeded occurrences within the next 90 days so the header widget has visible dates.
entries.useCase: An editor opens the admin calendar to scan event occurrences across the next publishing window.

entries.title: Event calendar widget.
entries.notes: Capture from EventCalendarPage or any host dashboard that renders EventCalendarWidget, with occurrences in the next 90 days.
entries.useCase: An editor checks the calendar widget for upcoming event dates without leaving the current admin context.

entries.title: Frontend events listing page.
entries.notes: Requires a public listing page, site/language context, and public non-cancelled occurrences. Anonymous output must not expose authoring markers, editor URLs, internal IDs, or package internals.
entries.useCase: A visitor browses public upcoming events for the current site.

entries.title: Frontend events calendar page.
entries.notes: Requires a public calendar page and seeded public occurrences. Anonymous output must stay free of editor controls, model IDs, signed URLs, and package internals.
entries.useCase: A visitor scans public events in calendar form without seeing admin-only metadata.

entries.title: iCalendar feed route.
entries.notes: The actual route name is capell-events.calendar-feed. Verify text/calendar output for seeded public events; screenshot can be a browser text capture of the feed body.
entries.useCase: A visitor or calendar client subscribes to the site's public event feed.
